column1: # amiral butin — embedded price table ($ per token, output-rate model)
# multi-provider from day one; refreshable from LiteLLM but never required.
# dated ids: the platform may report a model id with a trailing -YYYYMMDD
# MISS exactly once with that suffix stripped; if the undated id below still
# isn't found, the task stays unmeasurable — never a guessed/neighbouring
# rate. Only ids listed here (dated or not) are ever priced.
